{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Prince Rellask
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Prince Rellask]] is interested in curse magic.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c24">''The Knight'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
